errors.detail: LinkedIn API returned 404 for URN urn:li:share:7463404594140905473. URN may be malformed (share vs activity format) or post was deleted/revoked.
errors.note: From campaign state: 'Duplicate post error on retry indicates successful first post.' URN capture failed during linkedin-post.sh bug.
errors.action: Requires manual URN lookup via LinkedIn post URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/activity-7463404594140905473/
